title: 12 Colour Change Markers Set - Includes 10 Standard & 2 Special White Markers - Magical Colour Transformation - Fine Tip, Dual Tip Design - Perfect for Art & Craft Projects
features: 12-Piece Set: Includes 10 standard colour markers and 2 special white colour change markers.
Magical Colour Change: Colours change when drawn over with the white markers, creating a dynamic and interactive drawing experience.
High-Quality Ink: Vibrant, non-toxic ink that delivers smooth, consistent colour application.
Versatile Use: Ideal for art projects, crafting, and creative fun for all ages.
Easy to Use: Simply draw over existing colours with the white markers to see them transform.
description: Transform your art with the Colour Change Markers Set! This exciting pack includes 12 markers: 10 vibrant colour markers and 2 special white colour change markers. Watch in awe as colours magically shift when drawn over with the white markers. Ideal for artists of all ages, this set offers endless creative possibilities for drawing, doodling, and crafting. Perfect for enhancing your artwork or making unique gifts.
